name: agentbank-merchant
description: See your agentbank orders and live Curless wallet balance right in Claude. Authenticated by your Curless API key — no OAuth.
long_description: Merchant-side connector for agentbank. Tools: list_orders (orders agents have paid you) and get_balance (your live Curless wallet balance per currency — available / frozen). One-click install: enter your Curless API key + merchant id when prompted; the key never leaves your machine except to call agentbank.

tools.name: list_orders
tools.description: List this merchant's orders, newest first

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: This merchant's live Curless wallet balance per currency (available / frozen)

merchant_token.title: Merchant API key
merchant_token.description: Your Curless API key (issued by Curless at onboarding)
